title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 9-A.  LOUISIANA LICENSING AGENCY BUDGET ACT

§1331.  Short title

This Chapter may be cited as the "Louisiana Licensing Agency Budget Act".

Acts 1989, No. 751, §2, eff. July 8, 1989.
